user_prompt:
Clean technical schematic of the Spatio-Temporal Graph (ST) neural-network architecture (WindowedSpatioTemporalGATNet) for fNIRS classification. Publication-quality monochrome boxes-and-arrows with ONE accent color (teal). White background. Sans-serif labels. All tensor shapes in monospace. Wide horizontal flow, no 3D rendering, no photorealism.

Boxes left-to-right with arrows between:

(1) INPUT: rectangle 'Per-trial z-scored time series'. Tensor: 'Data.x: [B*23, T=326]', plus edge_attr [|E|, 2]. Below: '23 channels, 326 timepoints @ 10.17 Hz'.

(2) UNFOLD/WINDOW: rectangle 'unfold(dim=time, size=W=16, step=S=8)'. Tensor: '[B*23, K=39, 16]'. Annotation: 'K = floor((326-16)/8) + 1 = 39'.

(3) WINDOW STATS MODULE: rectangle '_compute_window_stats'. Inside: 'per-window stats: mean, min, max, var, skewness, kurtosis'. Tensor: '[B*23, K=39, 6]'. Annotation: 'fixed in_channels=6'.

(4) Vertical bracket grouping the next 3 boxes labeled 'shared GATv2 weights, applied per window k = 1..K':
  (4a) GATv2 LAYER 1: '2 heads, 80 filters, edge_dim=2, +residual, ELU, dropout 0.3, BatchNorm'.
  (4b) GATv2 LAYER 2: '2 heads, 80 filters'. Output per-window: '[B*23, 160]'.
  (4c) global_mean_pool over 23 nodes -> '[B, K=39, 160]'.

(5) PRE_GRU LINEAR: rectangle 'Linear(160 -> 192) + ELU'. Tensor: '[B, 39, 192]'.

(6) GRU: rectangle 'GRU, hidden=192, layers=1, batch_first=True'. Tensor: '[B, 39, 192]'.

(7) ADDITIVE ATTENTION over K windows: rectangle 'e_k = tanh(W_v g_k); alpha_k = softmax_k(W_u e_k); context = sum_k alpha_k g_k'. Tensor: '[B, 192]'.

(8) FC HEAD: rectangle 'Linear(192 -> 256) + ELU + Dropout'. Then 'Linear(256 -> 2)'. Output in ACCENT color: '[B, 2] logits -> softmax -> {HC, GAD}'.

Below: small caption 'XAI: temporal_attention = alpha_k (softmax over K windows); spatial_attention = GATv2 attention per (window, layer, head)'.

Avoid: brain anatomy, photographic textures, gradients, decorative icons. Use only sans-serif typography.

iterations.prompt:
Create a high-quality scientific diagram with these requirements:

VISUAL QUALITY:
- Clean white or light background (no textures or gradients)
- High contrast for readability and printing
- Professional, publication-ready appearance
- Sharp, clear lines and text
- Adequate spacing between elements to prevent crowding

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Clear, readable sans-serif fonts (Arial, Helvetica style)
- Minimum 10pt font size for all labels
- Consistent font sizes throughout
- All text horizontal or clearly readable
- No overlapping text

SCIENTIFIC STANDARDS:
- Accurate representation of concepts
- Clear labels for all components
- Include scale bars, legends, or axes where appropriate
- Use standard scientific notation and symbols
- Include units where applicable

ACCESSIBILITY:
- Colorblind-friendly color palette (use Okabe-Ito colors if using color)
- High contrast between elements
- Redundant encoding (shapes + colors, not just colors)
- Works well in grayscale

LAYOUT:
- Logical flow (left-to-right or top-to-bottom)
- Clear visual hierarchy
- Balanced composition
- Appropriate use of whitespace
- No clutter or unnecessary decorative elements

IMPORTANT - NO FIGURE NUMBERS:
- Do NOT include "Figure 1:", "Fig. 1", or any figure numbering in the image
- Do NOT add captions or titles like "Figure: ..." at the top or bottom
- Figure numbers and captions are added separately in the document/LaTeX
- The diagram should contain only the visual content itself


USER REQUEST: Clean technical schematic of the Spatio-Temporal Graph (ST) neural-network architecture (WindowedSpatioTemporalGATNet) for fNIRS classification.   (4b) GATv2 LAYER 2: '2 heads, 80 filters'. Output per-window: '[B*23, 160]'.
  (4c) global_mean_pool over 23 nodes -> '[B, K=39, 160]'.

(5) PRE_GRU LINEAR: rectangle 'Linear(160 -> 192) + ELU'. Tensor: '[B, 39, 192]'.

Generate a publication-quality scientific diagram that meets all the guidelines above.

early_stop_reason: Quality score 7.5 meets threshold 8.5 for journal
